      simpa [piFinset, Finset.mem_univ, true_and] using (Finset.mem_pi.1 this) k (by simp)
    have h1 : (I k).1 ∈ A := (Finset.mem_product.1 hI').1
    have h2 : (I k).2 ∈ A := (Finset.mem_product.1 hI').2
    have hLp1 : MemLp (X (I k).1) (2 * (m : ℝ)) μ := memLp_X (I k).1 h1
    have hLp2 : MemLp (X (I k).2) (2 * (m : ℝ)) μ := memLp_X (I k).2 h2
    have hInt1 : Integrable fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ := by
      simpa using (hLp1.norm.integrable (by
        have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (2 : ℝ) * (m : ℝ) := by
          have hm : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le m)
          nlinarith
        exact this))
    have hInt2 : Integrable fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).2 ω‖ := by
      simpa using (hLp2.norm.integrable (by
        have : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (2 : ℝ) * (m : ℝ) := by
          have hm : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le m)
          nlinarith
        exact this))
    simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using hInt1.mul hInt2

classical

classical
    refine integrable_finset_prod (s := Finset.univ) ?_
    intro k hk
    have hI' : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := by
      have : I k ∈ fun _ : Fin m ↦ A ×ˢ A := by
        simpa using (mem_piFinset.mp hI k)
      simpa using this
    have h1 : (I k).1 ∈ A := (by simpa [Finset.mem_product] using hI').1
    have h2 : (I k).2 ∈ A := (by simpa [Finset.mem_product] using hI').2
    have hLp1 : MemLp (X (I k).1) (2 * (m : ℝ)) μ := memLp_X (I k).1 h1
    have hLp2 : MemLp (X (I k).2) (2 * (m : ℝ)) μ := memLp_X (I k).2 h2
    have hInt1 : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).1 ω‖) μ := by
      refine (hLp1.norm.integrable ?_)
      have hm : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (2 * (m : ℝ)) := by
        have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le m)
        linarith
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) hm
    have hInt2 : Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ := by
      refine (hLp2.norm.integrable ?_)
      have hm : (1 : ℝ) ≤ (2 * (m : ℝ)) := by
        have : (0 : ℝ) ≤ (m : ℝ) := by exact_mod_cast (Nat.zero_le m)
        linarith
      exact lt_of_lt_of_le (by norm_num) hm
    simpa [mul_assoc, mul_left_comm, mul_comm] using hInt1.mul hInt2

classical
    rcases mem_piFinset.mp hI with hI
    have hmem : ∀ k : Fin m, (I k).1 ∈ A ∧ (I k).2 ∈ A := by
      intro k
      have : I k ∈ A ×ˢ A := hI k
      simpa [Finset.mem_product] using this
    have hL2m_1 : ∀ k : Fin m, MemLp (fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).1 ω‖) (2 * m : ℝ≥0∞) μ := by
      intro k
      simpa using (memLp_X _ (hmem k).1).norm
    have hL2m_2 : ∀ k : Fin m, MemLp (fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) (2 * m : ℝ≥0∞) μ := by
      intro k
      simpa using (memLp_X _ (hmem k).2).norm
    have hInt_mul : ∀ k : Fin m,
        Integrable (fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).1 ω‖ * ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) μ := by
      intro k
      have h₁ : MemLp (fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).1 ω‖) 2 μ :=
        (hL2m_1 k).mono_exponent (by
          have hm : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ (2 * m : ℝ≥0∞) := by
            simpa [two_mul, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_ofNat] using
              (mul_le_mul_left' (Nat.cast_le.2 (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 (Nat.zero_lt_succ _))) (2 : ℝ≥0∞))
          simpa using hm)
      have h₂ : MemLp (fun ω ↦ ‖X (I k).2 ω‖) 2 μ :=
        (hL2m_2 k).mono_exponent (by
          have hm : (2 : ℝ≥0∞) ≤ (2 * m : ℝ≥0∞) := by
            simpa [two_mul, Nat.cast_mul, Nat.cast_ofNat] using
              (mul_le_mul_left' (Nat.cast_le.2 (Nat.succ_le_iff.2 (Nat.zero_lt_succ _))) (2 : ℝ≥0∞))
          simpa using hm)
      simpa [mul_comm, mul_left_comm, mul_assoc] using (h₁.integrable_mul h₂)
    simpa using (integrable_finset_prod (s := (Finset.univ : Finset (Fin m))) fun k _ => hInt_mul k)
